Package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api

package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api
Public API for the Registermaschine compilation pipeline.

This package contains only stable interfaces for the compilation pipeline. including ILexer, IParser and ICompiler.

Concrete implementations are provided in
ConcreteLexer,
ConcreteParser and
ConcreteCompiler.
Users may implement their own versions by implementing the provided interfaces.

All interfaces in this package are stable and safe to depend on. Implementations in other packages may change without notice.

Since:
1.0.0
Author:
TiJ
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation
    Concrete implementations for the Registermaschine compilation pipeline.
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api.compiling

    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api.parsing
     
  • Interfaces
    Class
    Description
    ICompiler
    Defines the contract for a compiler that transforms a parsed syntax tree into a ICompiledProgram.
    ILexer
    Defines the contract for a lexical analyser (lexer) that transforms source code text into a list of tokens.
    IParser
    Defines the contract for a parser that transforms a sequence of tokens into a syntax tree suitable for compilation.
